data.body: e165 held-out TDD: 2 happy (TOFU genesis at epoch 0 + verify-at-valid-epoch) + 5 held-out (unsigned-rotation-refused, signed-rotation-accepted@epoch1, revoked-key fails@revoke-epoch passes@valid-epoch, keyring-survives-compaction+contiguous-epoch, epoch-from-fold-order). All RED (add_identity_key absent). Held out. Implementer dispatched with full brief (KEY events + 6 consumer sites, epoch-cursor fold, genesis bootstrap, snapshot freeze/restore, keyop_payload/verify_authorship_at_epoch/epoch_for_position, signed write-gate).
